tagline: Turn borrowed items into a game.

designSystem.style: Dark-first game UI with teal-violet accent palette, hexagonal token aesthetics, progress bars as game mechanics, trust ring SVG indicators, and card-based item tokens with urgency color coding (green/yellow/red). Micro-interactions on loan cards reveal action buttons. Streak calendar with filled day tiles.

screens: Board - Loan Trail map showing all active loans as expandable game tokens with status badges, progress bars, and inline nudge/return actions
Loans - Tab-switched view of lent-out vs borrowed items with add-new CTA and per-item urgency indicators
Quests - Mission board with trust streak calendar, dismissible quest cards (reminders, unlocks, milestones, progress quests)
Groups - Community boards with trust ring scores, expandable group cards with stats, recent activity feed
Profile - User hero with trust ring, stats, full loan history, settings list, and light/dark theme toggle
